case_title: THE GAYLORD HOTEL VS. CHRISTOPHER LOCK et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL SERVED JUL-07-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 620 JONES STREET, #807, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; ORDER FOR POSTING & MAILING; DECLARATION OF MAILING BY CERTIFIED MAIL ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL SERVED JUL-06-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER HEARING SET FOR OCT-13-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ;ORDER FOR POSTING & MAILING; DECLARATION OF MIALING BY CERTIFIED MAIL ATTACHED, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL SERVED JUL-06-2010, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT LOCK, CHRISTOPHER
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE GAYLORD HOTEL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-13-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER LOCK'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF CHRISTOPHER LOCK ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
